name: Linquine with Clam Sauce
recipeIngredient: 4 cans (5.5 or 7.0 ozs.) chopped clams with liquid
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium saucepan, sauté garlic in olive oil until golden.
2. Blend in flour to the garlic mixture.
3. Gradually stir in the remaining ingredients (clam cans, parsley, salt, and pepper) into the saucepan, making sure not to add the linguine at this stage.
4. Cook over medium-low heat, stirring constantly, until the sauce thickens.
5. Cook the linguine according to package directions; drain well once cooked.
6. Serve the cooked linguine with the clam sauce.
Makes 4 servings.
